pilot_entries.selection_rationale: Only claude-sonnet-4-5 reaches task_success on this seed, making it a clean first check for whether the task is easy for a human or unusually brittle to execution completeness and answer formatting.
Strong disagreement case on the hardest snapshot task; useful for testing whether the model spread reflects genuine ambiguity or agent-formatting fragility.
Failure-rich transform stress case with a visible troubleshooting and efficiency collapse for gpt-4o.
Clean provider split where OpenAI misses the troubleshooting narrative while Anthropic mostly clears it.
Broadest cross-model spread on growth_01, with all four frontier models landing in different overall-score bands.
Best single targeted miss for gpt-4o on growth_01 and a good robustness check on awkward or undersampled growth data.
